course.name: AI training for lawyers and legal professionals
course.description: Learn to use AI in your daily legal practice: case law research, document drafting and document analysis, while respecting professional secrecy.

hero.title: AI in the service
hero.description: Research, drafting, document analysis — learn to use AI in your daily practice while respecting professional secrecy and your ethical obligations.

rows.label: Format
rows.value: Online or in person, from half a day

problemSolution.title: The daily challenges of legal professionals facing AI
problemSolution.intro: Legal practice is demanding in terms of time and precision. AI can ease the burden — provided you know how to use it correctly and safely.

rows.problem: Case law research takes hours, even for familiar questions.
rows.solutionDesc: Write precise queries and get usable case law summaries, with sources for verification.

rows.problem: Drafting documents and submissions is time-consuming, even when the substance is clear.
rows.solutionDesc: Use AI to produce a structured first draft that you finalise with your expertise, without starting from a blank page.

rows.problem: Analysing large contracts or complex files takes a disproportionate amount of time.
rows.solutionDesc: Identify key clauses, risks and points of attention in minutes, without losing track of the document.

items.title: AI fundamentals for law
items: Understanding language models without technical jargon
Identifying risks and limitations for legal practice
Choosing the right tools given your ethical constraints
Setting up a secure working environment

items.title: AI-augmented drafting
items: Submissions, briefing notes and correspondence in 30% of the time

items.title: Document analysis and confidentiality
items: Anonymising client data before any AI processing

pricing.title: Tailored pricing
pricing.description: Pricing is adapted according to duration, number of participants and your specific needs. We help you choose the right option for your firm or organisation.

card.label: Tailored pricing
card.heading: Adapted to your organisation
card.subtitle: Pricing based on duration, number of participants and chosen format.

faq.title: What legal professionals ask before signing up

items.question: Is professional secrecy respected?
items.answer: Yes. We dedicate an entire module to data anonymisation and to choosing tools compatible with your ethical obligations. No client data is processed on unsecured third-party servers.

items.question: Do I need technical skills?
items.answer: No. The training is designed for legal professionals, not IT specialists. Everything is explained in business terms, with concrete cases drawn from legal practice.

items.question: How do the sessions work?
items.answer: Sessions online or in person, in small groups or in-house. Each session includes practical exercises on real legal cases.

items.question: Is the training accredited?
items.answer: Yes. A training certificate is issued at the end of the programme. Check with your Bar Association regarding recognition for continuing professional development.

ctaFinal.eyebrow: Ready to put it into practice?
ctaFinal.title: Join the legal professionals using AI with method
